history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person takes a mirror selfie indoors, standing near curtains and holding a phone in front of their face.

Main Subject:
A person with dark, tousled hair and a visible ear with white wireless earbuds holds a smartphone with a dark case in their left hand toward a mirror. The person faces sideways toward the camera, with one arm bent at the elbow and the phone covering much of the lower foreground; their mouth is slightly open and their gaze looks toward the phone or mirror reflection. They wear a gray zip-up hoodie over a dark shirt, along with a small cross-shaped necklace and a thin chain.

Setting:
The scene is indoors in a room with a wooden floor and office-like elements. In the background, there is a large glass or window panel on the left and a black chair near the center-left, along with curtains on the right. The lighting appears warm and even, suggesting indoor ambient light; the exact time of day is unclear.

Visual Details:
The camera angle is at about chest height, facing a reflective surface, creating a mirror/selfie viewpoint. The gray hoodie has a front zipper and a relaxed fit with the sleeves hanging loosely. The curtains on the right are light gray and folded vertically. The background includes dark wall areas and a reflective glass surface that shows faint reflections of the room.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a mirror selfie of a person wearing a gray hoodie and earbuds, holding a phone in front of their face. They stand indoors near gray curtains with an office chair and glass panel visible behind them.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

# Notes

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian man with dark, curly, tousled hair is taking a selfie in a room with a mirror. He is wearing a black t-shirt underneath an unzipped grey hoodie. He has a silver cross necklace and white wireless earbuds in his ears. He is holding a black smartphone in his right hand, angled to capture his reflection. The background shows a wooden floor, a black office chair with wheels, a dark teal wall, and grey curtains on the right side. The lighting is soft and appears to be coming from above, creating some shadows. The overall mood is casual and relaxed. The color palette is dominated by greys, blacks, and dark blues with a touch of natural wood tone. The style is contemporary and streetwear-inspired.
